channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: More than one-third of cloud environments are critically exposed, says Tenable
item.description: In the first half of this year, 38% of organizations had at least one cloud workload that was critically vulnerable, highly privileged, and publicly exposed, according to a study of telemetry from customers of cloud security vendor Tenable released this week.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: North Carolina maker of high-purity quartz back operating post-Helene
item.description: SPRUCE PINE, N.C. (AP) — One of the two companies that manufacture high-purity quartz used for making semiconductors and other high-tech products from mines in a western North Carolina community severely damaged by Hurricane Helene is operating again.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: If your agency is buying artificial intelligence, what are you exactly buying anyhow?
item.description: "General intellectual property law in the United States is still trying to figure out AI and a number of features of AI," procurement attorney Dan Ramish said. The post If your agency is buying artificial intelligence, what are you exactly buying anyhow? first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Login.gov facial recognition option gets GSA approval
item.description: Login.gov will allow its users to match a selfie with the photo on a government ID, such as a driver’s license. The post Login.gov facial recognition option gets GSA approval first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jory Heckman, Federal News Network

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Creepy yet helpful robot is ready to assist
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: American Water cyberattack renews focus on protecting critical infrastructure
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — A cyberattack continues to affect the largest regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, renewing a focus on the importance of protecting critical infrastructure sites.
item.dc:creator: BRUCE SHIPKOWSKI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: US considers asking court to break up Google as it weighs remedies in the antitrust case
item.description: The U.S. Department of Justice is considering asking a federal judge to break up Google after its ubiquitous search engine was declared an illegal monopoly, but it is just one of many possible remedies under review, according to a court filing.
item.dc:creator: SHAWN CHEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Databricks says with its new Databricks Apps platform, you can build tailored enterprise apps in 5 minutes
item.description: Every enterprise today is looking to get as much as possible out of its data and AI investments. But when building in-house apps, developers can struggle with infrastructure constraints and maintenance, security, data governance, compliance, and other issues.
item.dc:creator: Info World
